message:
fix(analytics): fix tutorial step timing and remove unused variable

- Fix time from step 0 (welcome) not being calculated when entering
  step 1 - changed condition from `previousStep > 0` to `>= 0`
- Remove unused 'url' variable in analytics-provider.tsx
- Simplify page_view event by using window/document directly (this
  code only runs in browser context)
